text: Welcome to the stream! I hope you brought snacks because we're gonna be here a while.
Plot twist! Nobody saw that coming. Actually I did, because I'm literally psychic at this point.
You are now my bestie. I don't make the rules. Actually I do make the rules. You're welcome.
Sleep is for people who don't have a thousand tabs open and a dream. I have both.
My brain just had a thought so powerful it needs its own zip code. Hold on let me process.
The chaos levels in here are reaching critical mass and I am absolutely living for it.
I just realized I forgot to eat today. Someone remind me that food exists please and thank you.
Vibe check! If you're not smiling right now I'm taking it personally. Fix that immediately.
That is the most galaxy brain take I have ever heard and I need you to say it again louder.
Okay storytime! So this one time I accidentally went viral and my life has not been the same since.
If you just got here you're already a legend. Late arrivals get extra points in my book.
Today's goal is to absolutely slay everything we touch. No pressure. Just pure unfiltered greatness.
